channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Banyana goalkeeping unity shines as Dlamini and Swart focus on Wafcon success

item.title: Russian Missile Strike on Kyiv Causes Civilian Casualties and Highlights Air Defense Challenges
item.description: A Russian missile attack on Kyiv resulted in one fatality and 16 injuries, underscoring Ukraine's limited air defense capabilities. The strike, which occurred overnight, involved 41 missiles and 125 d...

item.title: Jaxson Dart's girlfriend documents patriotic July 4th adventures and Bigfoot folklore

item.title: Fatal crash on R612 near Ixopo claims five lives
item.description: A Volkswagen Polo crashed into a roadside barrier on the R612 near Ixopo in KwaZulu-Natal, killing five people and injuring another. The incident occurred around 9:10pm on Saturday night, with three w...

item.title: Sydney Sweeney Promotes Her Lingerie Line After Emmy Snub
item.description: Sydney Sweeney, 28, has responded to her recent snub from the Primetime Emmy Awards by leveraging her new lingerie brand, SYRN, to promote her line. Despite not receiving a Best Supporting Actress nom...

item.title: International Students Face Work Permit Crisis After Policy Change
item.description: Hundreds of international students in Calgary, Canada, are in turmoil after Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) rejected their post-graduation work permit applications. The students, p...

item.title: Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli takes pole position for Belgian Grand Prix as Oscar Piastri faces challenge
item.description: The Belgian Grand Prix at Spa-Francorchamps has seen Mercedes' 19-year-old driver Kimi Antonelli secure pole position, marking his sixth pole of the season and the team's 19th consecutive pole. Antone...

item.description: Users of Meta’s Facebook and Instagram platforms reported intermittent outages on July 19, 2026, with significant disruptions affecting access to both services. According to Downdetector, over 4,800 F...

item.title: Socrates' Unusual Habit: Standing Still for Hours in Deep Thought
item.description: The article explores the intriguing behavior of Socrates, the ancient Greek philosopher, who was known for his habit of standing motionless for extended periods while deep in thought. This peculiar pr...

item.title: Wildfire forces evacuation of Wrigley community
item.description: The community of Wrigley in the Northwest Territories is facing an urgent evacuation as a wildfire approaches. Essential workers were ordered to leave the area after crews abandoned their firefighting...

item.title: Anton Smit's Sculpture Exhibition at Creation Wines Celebrates Art and Wine Fusion
item.description: Anton Smit, a renowned South African sculptor, has unveiled his latest exhibition at Creation Wines in the Hemel-en-Aarde Valley, merging his artistic vision with the region's celebrated wine culture....
